questionText: Design Google Search Auto-Complete (Typeahead suggestions) system.
sampleAnswer: To design typeahead suggestions, we need a system that returns top 5 matching queries as a user types. We use a Trie data structure stored in memory. At scale, the Trie is partitioned by prefixes across servers. We pre-aggregate search trends offline using MapReduce/Spark to update node frequencies, caching top recommendations at the edge CDNs for extremely low latency response (under 10ms).
keyPoints: Browser local caching of recent inputs
